package rulecoverage

func NegativeContextKeyUsesExportedOrBuiltinType() string {
    ruleID := "context_key_uses_exported_or_builtin_type"
    family := "context"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "context.WithValue keys or exported key declarations that use built-in scalar types instead of unexported key types."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
